sentences.arabic: تَعْتَمِدُ اللُّغَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ كَثِيرًا عَلَى الِاسْتِعَارَةِ وَالتَّشْبِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski jezik se u velikoj mjeri oslanja na metaforu i poređenje.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic language relies heavily on metaphor and simile.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا نَقُولُ "الْقَمَرُ وَجْهُ طِفْلٍ"، فَنَحْنُ نَصِفُ الْجَمَالَ.
sentences.translation: Kada kažemo "mjesec je lice djeteta", opisujemo ljepotu.
sentences.translationEn: When we say 'the moon is a child's face,' we are describing beauty.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الصُّوَرُ تَجْعَلُ النَّصَّ أَقْوَى وَأَجْمَلَ لِلْقَارِئِ.
sentences.translation: Ove slike čine tekst snažnijim i ljepšim za čitaoca.
sentences.translationEn: These images make the text stronger and more beautiful for the reader.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْكُتَّابُ هَذِهِ الْأَسَالِيبَ فِي الرِّوَايَاتِ وَالْمَقَالَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Pisci koriste ove metode u romanima i člancima.
sentences.translationEn: Writers use these methods in novels and articles.

sentences.arabic: الْخَيَالُ جُزْءٌ أَسَاسِيٌّ مِنْ كُلِّ عَمَلٍ أَدَبِيٍّ نَاجِحٍ.
sentences.translation: Mašta je suštinski dio svakog uspješnog književnog djela.
sentences.translationEn: Imagination is an essential part of every successful literary work.
